pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which creates the virtual repository 'libs-virtual', and verifier.py which checks its configuration.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh and verifier.py which require 'example-repo-local' to be set as the default deployment repository.
Verified by reading scripts/task_utils.sh which sets the environment variable ADMIN_USER='admin' for all API interactions.
Verified by reading scripts/task_utils.sh which sets the environment variable ADMIN_PASS='password' for all API interactions.
Verified by reading scripts/task_utils.sh which sets ARTIFACTORY_URL='http://localhost:8082' for connecting to the local Artifactory instance.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a local JFrog Artifactory instance at 'http://localhost:8082' using default administrator credentials ('admin':'password'). It specifically targets the virtual repository 'libs-virtual', which needs to be configured to use 'example-repo-local' as its default deployment repository.
